name: Steamed Rice Coconut Milk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3 tablespoons of rice flour, 1/4 cup of coconut milk, and 1/2 teaspoon of yeast with the wine rice ball. Cover and allow to stand at room temperature for three hours.
2. Cook 2 1/2 cups of coconut milk with sugar just long enough to melt the sugar. Remove from heat and cool.
3. After the yeast-rice flour mixture has rested, combine it with the cooled coconut milk-sugar mixture. Mix well, cover, and allow to rest at room temperature for another 3 hours.
4. At the end of the resting time, add the remaining coconut milk, lemon juice, and dissolved yeast (dissolve in water) to the mixture. Transfer to several small bowls or pans so that the mixture fills them only halfway to allow room for expansion. Let stand overnight at room temperature.
5. The following day, steam using the wet steaming method as described on page 36 for 30 minutes.
6. Serve the cake either hot, cold, or at room temperature.
Note: A wine rice ball can be purchased in Oriental grocery stores. They are about the size of a camphor ball and white. To crush, use a rolling pin or blender. Steaming requires a pot with boiling water and two additional perforated metal inserts that fit directly on the lower pot of water, allowing wet steam to circulate freely through the layers and enabling cooking multiple foods simultaneously.
